signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Traffic declines across NIKE Direct were more significant than we anticipated... this included the back-to-school period as our results underperformed the market.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Slightly elevating marketplace inventories requiring higher levels of promotional activity in Q1 to drive conversion... we've taken into consideration a more muted point of view on retail sales trends and also the gross margin implications of needing to not only be more promotional.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: A comeback at this scale takes time. And while there are some early wins, we have yet to turn the corner... we've moderated our near-term expectations for China for the remainder of this year.
